# Paul-Henri Thiry, Baron d'Holbach

*1723 – 1789 · French (German-born) · [The Enlightenment](../movements/enlightenment.md)*

German-born philosopher, a host of the Parisian [Enlightenment](../movements/enlightenment.md) and author of The System of Nature, a manifesto of atheist materialism.

> Stub profile: only this mini-card exists so far; the sourced axis positions remain to be authored. Contributions welcome.
